meaning: n.联姻,异族结婚,近亲结婚
examples: Now, consider three indices of assimilation—language, home ownership and intermarriage.
Foreign-born Asians and Hispanics have higher rates of intermarriage than do US-born whites and blacks.
The ban on intermarriage here is quite specific.
High rates of intermarriage signal a breakdown in barriers between racial or ethnic groups.
College graduates are much more likely to regard intermarriage positively than those with only a high-school diploma.
